synopsis: Princess Leia makes regular entries in her data pad, a palm-sized computer hidden in her belt. In each entry she recalls all details of her intergalactic capture and rescue—and how she really feels about Han Solo and Luke. PRINCESS LEIA DATA PAD LOCATION: PRISONER'S DOCK, DEATH STAR "I don't know how I can escape this station of death. Or how I can continue to fight against the torture and the pain. But I vow that I will. And then the real battle will begin. Not for vengeance—for justice."
title: Star Wars Journal: Captive to Evil
